name: Burgess bounds for short character sums evaluated at forms II: the mixed case
title: Burgess bounds for short character sums evaluated at forms II: the mixed case
abstract: Proves a Burgess bound for multidimensional mixed character sums with multiplicative characters evaluated at admissible forms and additive characters at polynomials.
findings: Downloaded for comparison. A direct match between its admissible-form setting and the H15 reciprocal phase has not been established.
